ui.title: EE Revenue Analytics Widget
ui.desc: Show all EE Revenue Analytics Widget here.

data.sql: SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,METRIC_LABEL,VL FROM (SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'Daily' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_PAID_INT_SUM)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_PAID_INT_SUM IS NOT NULL AND FA_PMT_DT>=TRUNC(SYSDATE)-1 AND FA_PMT_DT<TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'Weekly' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_PAID_INT_SUM)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_PAID_INT_SUM IS NOT NULL AND FA_PMT_DT>=TRUNC(SYSDATE,'IW')-7 AND FA_PMT_DT<TRUNC(SYSDATE,'IW') GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'Monthly' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_PAID_INT_SUM)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_PAID_INT_SUM IS NOT NULL AND FA_PMT_DT>=ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM'),-1) AND FA_PMT_DT<TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'Quarterly' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_PAID_INT_SUM)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_PAID_INT_SUM IS NOT NULL AND FA_PMT_DT>=ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'Q'),-3) AND FA_PMT_DT<TRUNC(SYSDATE,'Q') GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'Yearly' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_PAID_INT_SUM)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS='M' AND FA_PAID_INT_SUM IS NOT NULL AND FA_PMT_DT>=ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YYYY'),-12) AND FA_PMT_DT<TRUNC(SYSDATE,'YYYY') GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE) ORDER BY CASE METRIC_LABEL WHEN 'Daily' THEN 1 WHEN 'Weekly' THEN 2 WHEN 'Monthly' THEN 3 WHEN 'Quarterly' THEN 4 WHEN 'Yearly' THEN 5 END
